span.p:
ACCOMMODATION DESIGN
the founding question:
what does the system need?

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
TASK DECOMPOSITION
how to structure
the task

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
INPUT INVERSION
how to structure
the input

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
VOICE GOVERNANCE
how to constrain
the output

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
LENS EXTRACTION
how to evaluate
the result

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
PROSTHETIC COGNITION
when to extend
vs replace thinking

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
SEMANTIC HIERARCHY
how to preserve
what mattered

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
COORDINATOR BUILDING
build infrastructure
that embodies all of it
